qa_pairs.question: How can a user list the available Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) configurations and full GPU names on a specific cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can list all available Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) flavours and full size GPU names on a given cluster by running the command: `sinfo -o "%G"|grep gpu|sed 's/gpu://g'|sed 's/),/\n/g'|cut -d: -f1|sort|uniq`.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find information about the recommended maximum number of CPU cores and amount of system memory for each Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) instance?
qa_pairs.answer: The recommended maximum number of CPU cores and amount of system memory per Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) instance are detailed in the 'table of ratios in bundles' section of the documentation, which is linked under 'Allocations_and_compute_scheduling'.
